name: Cannon Shogi
author: Abstract Games factory
description: Cannon Shogi (Peter Michaelsen, 1998): standard 9x9 Shogi plus four cannon pieces borrowed from Xiangqi and Janggi (two orthogonal, two diagonal; two slide-and-jump-to-capture, two jump-to-move) and Janggi soldiers in place of pawns. Drops and zone promotion as in Shogi.
